description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 29,600 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This twisted iron staff bears ominous stains along its length, and ends in a black skull with red gemstone eyes. The staff allows use of the following spells: Align weapon (evil only, 1 charge) Detect good (1 charge) Magic circle against good (2 charges) Unholy blight (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells align weapon, detect good, magic circle against good, unholy blight; Cost 14,800 gp.
